title: Oral-B CrossAction Toothbrush Heads - 16 Degree Bristles for Superior Cleaning
description:
Product Description
The Oral-B CrossAction brush head is our most advanced replacement brush and is now available as a Black Edition. With the perfectly angled CrissCross bristles, it goes deep into the interdental spaces and ensures a superior plaque removal compared to a conventional manual toothbrush. The blue indicator bristles indicate when to change the brush head. The brush head is compatible with all Oral-B electric toothbrushes except Oral-B Pulsonic. 3 Oral-B CrossAction Black Edition replacement toothbrush heads are included.
Set Contains:
3 x replacement brushes.
features: Advanced brush heads reach deep between the teeth
With the perfectly angled CrissCross bristles
The blue indicator bristles indicate when to change the brush head

reviews.title: Great for Sensitive Gums and Teeth
reviews.text:
I was told by my dentist to switch toothbrushes from manual to Oral-B electric toothbrush because it stops brushing when you brush too hard and keeps your enamel in tact, which helps relieve sensitive teeth. The dentist also recommended Oral-B because it was a good price point and has great features like a timer for 2 minutes and gets really close to the gum to get rid of icky plaque. Since I have been using Oral-B, he has noticed that I no longer have any plaque build up between cleanings and my sensitive teeth are gone. He also says my teeth look whiter and brighter. I love the toothbrush because it is light and easy to hold and get to those hard to reach places in the back of your mouth. It also leaves your teeth feeling extremely clean compared to a manual toothbrush. I can never go back to a regular toothbrush now because I tried on vacation once and felt absolutely disgusting in comparison. Oral-B is definitely the way to go for a clean mouth feel!

mouthwashes to ACT Restoring because it restores enamel that is weak and will alleviate sensitivity and use Glide Comfort Floss. Boy, was she correct. After just a few days of using the mouthwash I no longer feel that uncomfortable sensation on my teeth. I also am no longer needing prescription strength toothpaste. I now use this mouthwash twice daily and floss once a day, in combination with Sensodyne's Repair and Protect toothpaste. My gums do not bleed when I floss and I don't dread flossing. Glide floss goes easily between even the tightest teeth and has a lovely mint flavor that helps freshen breath at the same time. Changing the floss and mouthwash have made a huge improvement and now I can eat hot or cold foods without wincing in pain.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: I really like the cross action feature on these guys, I am able to feel the clean sensation on it.  It is well worth the price.

The packaging seems great, however these arrived in a plastic Amazon bag, so it sort cancel’s out the intention. So I’m a little disappointed and will unfortunately bring my plastic traveling toothbrush just incase this one doesn’t work for me. So tiny for a 6 day trip! reviews.title: Great value for the money sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Great adult sonic toothbrush for a nice value. One thing to note is this vibrates rather than spins. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. Regardless, I enjoy using it. It comes with 6 replacement heads for a 18 month supply, which is pretty impressive. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. 60+ day charge. Nice black color. Easy to use & charge. Great value for the money.

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

reviews.title: Attractive yellow color!
reviews.text: First of all, I love this bright yellow colored electric toothbrush! A refreshing change from the regular black and  white sonic electric toothbrushes that are on the market right now! The bristles are ordinary but the extra brush heads make up for it. The price is just the same like the regular sonic brushes right now so it is worth a try!

reviews.title: Strong Vibration
reviews.text: Works well with strong vibration. Timer works well with 30 seconds intervals. Brushes well with soft bristles. The only thing that I personally don't like is the slippery handle. Otherwise it is a good product. Shipping was fast.

reviews.title: The Yellow is Very Cheerful
reviews.text: This is a nice electric toothbrush for the price. It has multiple settings (clean, soft, polish, massage, and white), although I tend to leave it on white most of the time. The sunny yellow color is really quite cheerful and is a bright start to the day. The bristles are softer than others I've used, which is nice for those of us who tend to brush too hard. I really like that the brush head (and even the bristles) match the body... all in the same sunny yellow. I'm also impressed that it came with so many replacement brush heads, each with their own cover. I won't need to buy replacements for a long time! I'm pretty impressed overall.

reviews.title: Really Like It!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is sleek and powerful and I really like all of the different settings. It has a good battery life - I have only had to charge it twice so far.

reviews.title: tried 2 batteries for 3762 model & none charge
reviews.text:
I have 3762 model of toothbrush which is compatible based on description of product. I needed to replace the battery because original one would last for 1 week and require frequent charging..
I thought that it will be more convinient to get this battery than waiting on replacement that would be shipped from France.. However, first battery that I got was not charging at all. I soldered everything correctly, replaced original battery & was attempting to charge it for 24hrs - no luck. It wouldn't even start, the second I would press the power button it would just show red indicator right away..
And then I decided to give it another try and get replacement battery - I thought that might be I got a defective one.. I soldered 2nd battery on, and got same results.
I will be returning both while I'm waiting on JDK battery to arrive from France.
And just to mention, it seemed like pins are probably 2 times thiner than pins that original battery had. However, I didn't have any problems with them - if you're careful enough you won't break it.. but that wasn't my issue with this product.

reviews.title: Instructions aren’t great, but Customer Service was very accommodating.
reviews.text:
This product is better than the expensive one I bought from my dentist. It’s great.
The instructions for use weren’t great, but Customer Service was very accommodating.

title: Oral-B Pulsar Battery Toothbrush With Charcoal Infused Bristles, Soft
description: Oral B Pulsar charcoal infused toothbrush is battery operated to gently vibrate and polish away stains for a whiter, cleaner smile. Using the same technique to brush as a manual toothbrush, The bristles vibrate providing a gentle massaging and polishing action while brushing. The bristles penetrate between teeth where stain build-up often begins. Pulsar has soft vibrating bristles that help break up plaque between teeth. Plus, the split head design moderates the amount of pressure applied to your teeth and gums. Contouring to your unique smile, The Pulsar toothbrush will leave your smile bright and clean with every use.
features: You will receive 1 Oral-B Pulsar battery toothbrush with charcoal infused bristles, battery included
The Charcoal infused bristles gently vibrate to effectively clean plaque and remove surface stains for whiter teeth
Penetrates deep between teeth and hard-to-reach areas of the mouth to sweep away plaque and stains caused by Food
Adjusts to the contours of your teeth and moderates the pressure applied to your teeth and gums
Oral-B is the #1 dentist-recommended toothbrush brand worldwide

reviews.title: Hello OralB
reviews.text: It’s an Oral-B.  I prefer this brand and hopped on the charcoal type at the advice of my former dentist.  She recommended.

reviews.title: Weak vibration
reviews.text: Not the best

reviews.title: Great Product!
reviews.text: Great Product!

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I always use the Oral B battery toothbrushes - I’m over 80, with my original teeth, and this toothbrush has kept me in good shape for years.  I like that they remind me to get a new about every three months.  The charcoal one helps to keep my teeth as white as they can be at this age - no taste involved - just mixes with your toothpaste and it does a great job.  I also find that this toothbrush brushes my gums, too, and I have not had any bleeding gums in years.  This is the only toothbrush I will buy.

reviews.title: Clean Those Teeth
reviews.text:
I love this electric tooth brush, by Oral-B as it is so different from ones I have tried before. I thought I would have to insert the battery but to my surprise it was already inserted and ready to be used. It was so easy and the button you need to push is clearly marked with a + so you push that and you are ready to add toothpaste and brush away. Just push the – sign and it stops. That was so easy and fast and you got a good brushing of your teeth. The bristles are charcoal infused bristle and this adds to completely clean your teeth and makes them feel clean.

I am wondering what one has to do if battery is used up as could not figure out where to change a battery. There was not that much explanations but I am enjoying the use of this great Oral-B for a great battery tooth brush. Great way to start the day with an Oral-B electric tooth cleaning.

reviews.title: Very classy denture bath box.
reviews.text: Man I hate having a dazzling bright colored denture bath box on the counter.  My husband always leaves it out so I was excited to find a classy black hard case.  It works great and looks sooooo much better!

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.text: The product is high quality, and I love it.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: I really like this one

reviews.title: Very cute & conveniently covert
reviews.text: When I received my order, I was very pleased. The denture box was pink and, sitting on my bathroom sink, it does not look like a denture container at all. It looks more like some kind of cosmetic container, which pleases me even more. I just ordered a black one for my 2nd pair of dentures.

reviews.title: Very  helpful
reviews.text: I got this for my retainers that I just got. It does a great job when I need to clean them. It also works as a great storage case for your retainers when you are on the go.😁😊🥰

title: SVITOO Infant Toddler Toothbrush, 2 Pcs Toddler Training Teeth Brushes with Thousands of Soft Bristles, Children Oral Care for Sensitive Gums for 12 Months to 6 Years Babies, Prevent Stuck Throat
features: 【SVITOO Baby/Children Toothbrush】Specially designed for babies and children aged 1-6 years. Food grade materials have passed FDA testing. Creative and lovely toothbrush is a gift for children

【10000 Fine Soft Bristles - Soft Rubber Brush Head】the center of the brush head adopts tens of thousands of bristles, which is very soft and dense. It is our unique design, which can better clean the baby's teeth and mouth. The outer soft silicone brush head has the effect of massaging gums

【Safety baffle】The bear shaped block can attract children, prevent the toothbrush from going too deep into the baby's mouth, prevent the brush head from lying flat on the table and keep it clean. This is creative toothbrush

[easy to hold + suction cup] ergonomic design, suitable for female / male infants over 1 year old. The suction cup can make the toothbrush stand upright on the desktop or adsorb on the wall for convenient placement

【Easy to Clean】Polymer nanomaterials can reduce bacterial reproduction and are easy to clean. You only need to wash with warm water after use. We recommend changing it once a month is better for your baby. Any questions, feel free to contact us.

reviews.title: Soft for gums and tiny teeth.
reviews.text: Cute little tooth brush for babies to learn with. Not going to hurt gums if they start to chew on it. Can see a two year old learning to brush well after tries as a baby with this safe brush.

reviews.title: Love the design
reviews.text: Its so cute and the bristles are soft so its perfect for a toddler.

reviews.title: Great size...
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are the perfect size for toddlers.  The bristles are soft and the handle is made of a combination of hard plastic and silicone, so it’s easy to grip.  The optional silicone guard is perfect for helping little ones learn how to control the brush.  And, each brush has a suction cup on the end of the handle, so it’s easy to stand them up in the bathroom counter.  My only issue is that one of the brushes got smashed during delivery and the silicone guard is bent inwards...it will probably pop out in time, so really only a minor issue.  Overall, nice infant to toddler toothbrushes!

reviews.title: One of my favorite toddler toothbrushes
reviews.text: I really love how theses have the guards. My nephew has special needs so while he's 8, he physically is like an infant. We are teaching him how to hold a toothbrush and brush his own teeth. This is great because he always puts too much in his mouth and ends up choking. If you have a new leader to brushing teeth this is most definitely will be your saving grace.

title: Kids Toothbrush Replacement Heads for Oral-B, Extra-Soft Bristles, Fits for Oral-B Braun Electric and Battery Brushes, Except Vitality Sonic, CrossActino Power, Sonic Complete, Pulsonics, EB-10A
features: Premium Quality and Safe Guarantee - Our Electric Toothbrush heads have passed certification, and brush heads come with sealed container for hygienic storage, effectively protect your toothbrush head from outside pollution, it is a best gift for women, man, or yourself.

Extra-Soft Bristles - The extra-soft bristles, so your child can get a thorough clean as they learn proper oral care habits. Ideal for ages 3+, the design is perfect for a smaller mouth, putting a powerful yet gentle clean in their growing hands.
All Round Clean - Round brush head is inspired by dental professional tools for a tooth-by-tooth clean, with specially engineered bristles for optimal tooth coverage

Kids replacement brush heads has special, smaller bristles which provide gentle, extra-soft brushing and make it ideal for the smaller teeth and mouth-size of children. Recommended for children from 3 years onwards.

Features- 1. Cleans teeth and massages gently 2. Inter-dental tips : Penetrate hard-to-reach areas 3. Effectively removes plaque without irritating 4. Indicator bristles : Fade halfway to signal when to replace your brush head.

reviews.title: Check the size
reviews.text: Disappointed, I read it wrong and thought these were official oral b replacement heads. It’s smaller than the original one on my sons toothbrush and just doesn’t feel durable. I guess time will tell.

reviews.title: Bristles are harder than advertised.
reviews.text:
The description states that it has 'Extra-Soft Bristles' which is why I purchased it.
I've found this is not the case.
They are not the hardest bristles, but they're not as soft as advertised.

reviews.title: Were they kidding?
reviews.text:
Not soft at all.
Has a piece that sticks out of the middle.
Totally inappropriate for children!
To be used with an Oral-B toothbrush that is so harsh?
I contacted the seller before I bought but never got a reply.

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: Good deal compared to buying name brand but they do feel like cheap plastic and they’re not the softest. Worth it though to save some money if you want to change them out as often as you should. The oral b brand replacements are too expensive IMO.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Son likes the different color. Fits his oral b toothbrush well. Perfect for little ones teeth. Thank you

title: Oral B Compatible Replacement Brush Heads- Holiday Pack of 16 Double Clean, Cross, Floss, and Precise Oralb Braun Compatible Electric Toothbrush Parts- Fits Oral-B Kids, Pro 1000 + More!
features: VARIETY PACK OF 16 ORAL B BRAUN REPLACEMENT BRUSH HEADS- Includes 4 Double brushes, 4 Cross Brushes, 4 Precision brushes and 4 Floss Clean brushes. Try out all these unique oralb compatible replacements and find the one you’ll love!
FLOSS ORAL-B ELECTRIC TOOTHBRUSH HEAD- Gives the whole mouth a floss-like cleaning, including the interdental spaces; and removes plaque. Our advanced bristles are designed for superior clean.
CROSS ORALB GENERIC REPLACEMENT BRUSHES- Have perfectly angled bristles which levels & cover more surface to reach and remove more plaque.
DOUBLE CLEAN HEADS- Twice the cleaning action with 2 simultaneously moving brushes, which oscillate, pulsate and rotate to provide better teeth hygiene.
PRECISION STYLE HEADS- These electric toothbrush heads provide similar brushing motion of a manual toothbrush, but remove 100% more plaque.

QUALITY AND CONVENIENCE WHILE YOU SAVE $$$$$$$!- All replacement brush heads come with color coded bands so you can share this bulk package with everyone! Save time and money with our family sized pack of brush heads compatible with MOST oral b electric toothbrushes (excluding the Sonic, Pulsonic and battery powered brushes that use ONE AA battery).

reviews.title: Worked Great!
reviews.text: I have the kids Oral -B toothbrushes. I opened every pack and checked the fit for each one. They all worked perfectly. They look and feel the same as the original brand. Great deal!

title: N-amboo Super Hard Toothbrush Bamboo Toothbrush Large Brush Head Manual Toothbrsuh Hard Bristles Pack of 4
description: Super Hard Bristles,More Cleaning Bamboo toothbrush,eco-friendly Large brush head

reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: These are HARD
reviews.text:
UPDATE: these ended up making my tongue bleed quite a bit. Why you’d need this type of brush for your mouth… I have no idea. Can’t return cause I used it. Otherwise I would , so I think I’ll use them for a teeny bonfire.

I will preface this by saying I use an electric oral b cross action toothbrush . I got these to brush my tongue . And the toothbrush is HARD. Like it made my tongue bleed. Idk who is using this for their teeth lol be careful if u are. It worked amazing for the purpose I got it for but just be cautious.

title: Philips Sonicare 4100 Electric Rechargeable Power Toothbrush, Black, with Genuine Optimal Plaque Control Replacement Toothbrush Heads, White, 3 Pack
description: Remove plaque and experience a deep, effective clean with Sonicare technology, removing up to 5x-7x more plaque vs. a manual toothbrush. Sonicare technology gently pulses water between your teeth, for a month's worth of manual brushing in just 2 minutes. The QuadPacer lets you know when you've spent the optimal amount of time on each section of your mouth while the SmarTimer signals when your 2 minutes is up. The pressure sensor flashes red to remind you to ease off, helping to prevent gum recession, while the 2 intensity settings ensure a comfortable clean that’s right for you. Going electric might feel like a big step, but with this brush you’re in safe hands. Its slim ergonomic design and familiar-shaped head gives you everything you need for an effective clean. The kit includes 1 Philips Sonicare 4100 electric toothbrush, 1 Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush head and 1 USB charger (wall adaptor not included). An additional 3 pack of Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush heads included.
features: Removes up to 5x-7x more plaque vs. a manual toothbrush. Battery life up to 14 days
Pressure sensor and two intensity settings protect sensitive gums from overbrushing
2 minute SmarTimer with QuadPacer ensure Dentist-recommended brushing time
Genuine Philips Sonicare rechargeable electric toothbrush replacement heads compatible with all Philips Sonicare click-on rechargeable toothbrush handles
Number one recommended power toothbrush brand by Dental Professionals
Up to 6x more plaque removal versus a manual toothbrush

reviews.title: Just don't buy!
reviews.text: It's ridiculous NOT to have a power adapter for a tooth brush: how many people have USB charging port in there bathroom? Give me a break! Don't buy from a manufacture who lost common sense.

reviews.title: Buyer beware … this is a fake. You may as well brush your teeth with cotton.
reviews.text: This is a fake. Don’t buy it. It is literally like brushing your teeth with air . Your teeth will be fuzzy for days. Do not buy.

reviews.title: Love this toothbrush
reviews.text: I I’ve this toothbrush! The power is great . After using it feels like the dentists has just cleaned your teeth

reviews.title: Great toothbrush
reviews.text: My teeth have never felt cleaner. If you’ve never used a toothbrush like this, you have to adjust to vibrations of it, it’ll take a couple days. After that, you’ll never go back to another toothbrush. It has a pressure sensor to let you know you’re brushing too hard and a time alert to let you know to switch sections.

reviews.title: Works great but not the same as the more expensive models.
reviews.text: Feels cheap in the hands but does the job who knows how long it will last. They all seem to fail at the main seal at the top.

reviews.title: Fit all size toothbrushes

title: Violife VS2T705 Slim Sonic Toothbrush, Garnet Shimmer
description: The slim sonic brings a whole new dimension to sonic toothbrushes, merging fashion, ease of use, and best of all, its slim size make it a perfect on-the-go companion. It's sleek, compact and truly portable with a snap on vented mascara style cap keeping your toothbrush clean and dry. Bring the slim sonic toothbrush everywhere, at 6.5 inch high and 2 ounce it will fit in your purse, cosmetic case, backpack or briefcase for a healthy, sexy smile anywhere anytime.
features: 22,000 brush strokes per minute at the push of a button; A true sonic toothbrush preferred by dentists vs regular electronic toothbrushes producing 7,500 brush strokes per minute
Brush head is replaceable; Bristles are soft to medium
Includes slim sonic, 2 brush heads and 1 AAA battery
Ready to use right out of the box
Great gift for anyone who brushes their teeth

reviews.title: Lacks power
reviews.text:
China makes some good products. This isn't one of them. How they got away from calling it a "Sonic Toothbrush" is a crime.
Phillips Sonicare mades a great electric toothbrush. Violive is less effective than manual brushing by far. Don't waste your $$$.

reviews.text: The electric part of this toothbrush stopped working almost immediately. It works OK as a normal toothbrush, just not worth the extra money.

reviews.title: Compact
reviews.text: Wish there were different settings but it works great and does what it is-a toothbrush. Perfect for traveling with. Hope the battery life is good!
